items.title: Top Analyst Reports for Berkshire Hathaway, Toyota Motor & McDonald's
items.description: Analysts spotlight Berkshire, Toyota and McDonald's, highlighting growth drivers, risks and market performance in new research reports.

items.title: Florida restaurants are shutting down amid a ‘tough summer’ of rising costs, weak tourism — here's why
items.description: A perfect storm of headwinds is blasting the industry.

items.title: Why Krispy Kreme Fell Today
items.description: One Wall Street analyst isn't buying management's turnaround plan.

items.title: After Failed McDonald’s Partnership, Krispy Kreme Has Recovery Plans. J.P. Morgan Has Doubts.
items.description: Krispy Kreme stock is down 65% this year, as it works to overcome distribution setbacks. J.P. Morgan downgraded the shares on Wednesday.

items.title: DASH Gains From Robust Marketplace GOV: A Sign for More Upside?
items.description: DoorDash benefits from a 23% jump in Marketplace GOV and a growing partner base, fueling revenue growth and strong share performance in 2025.
